name: shopease
description: Advanced DB Project Project: Create an online e-commerce platform called Shopease Type of platform: E-commerce Main Objective: Build a good Database Platform: Postgresql API Development: Node.js (just to make sure the backend works instead of creating a whole Front-End) Node.js API will ensure the backend is connected to the front end and also check if it's working. Documentation: Swagger Also, we're permitted to get a sample dataset of a minimum of 10,000 records instead of creating it ourselves. Use your SPU GitHub acounts
